title: The Great Beyond
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:???}} __NOTOC__ {{Background|num=22222|file=Pure Whiteness.png}} {{Transparent Theme 2}}
=FATE.= Hello, intrepid wanderer. I have been monitoring you for a long, long time. You have journeyed through a thousand levels through sheer will and perseverance. You have seen your friends die before your eyes. You have gone through ultimate pain and torture. But you denied. You denied the ending you sought. You rejected the end you worked so hard to fight for, to survive for. And so you repeated the cycle. You altered it, but still, you had no satisfaction. Your worst mistake was choosing a different path, making different decisions from the ones you made before. You continued to traverse through levels that broke all laws of everything, levels that shattered and restored your beliefs over and over again. The first time, your greed and pride swayed your thoughts and kept you going until you found yourself in a palace. The second time, your gullibility and innocence were the main reasons for your downfall. Mercy does not exist in hell. You had reached the end of the cycle. But once more, you denied it. But this time, you had learnt from your past mistakes. You stayed within the end of the cycle, trying to find another escape, a key that would lead you to an imaginary ending that you had dreamed of ever since you entered the never-ending layers of hell. It seemed that there was only one way out, but you continued to search. Until you finally found the exit that you were looking for. An opening within the distortion and corruption that the end of the cycle contained. Then, there was a door. You walked forward, slowly and carefully opening the door. What awaited you? Was this the end? Questions filled your mind as you closed your eyes and ran towards your fate. There was a flash of lights. Your whole journey appeared before your eyes. Your body tried to stop you. Your mind tried to stop you. Everything, even yourself, was fighting against your determination. You couldn't give up at this stage. You were so close to freedom. With all of your energy, something resonated within you. With ultimate dedication, you remembered what your mission was, and marched forward. And so, with all of your remaining might, you denied the voices and shouted. ='''I WILL WIN'''= ='''WIN'''= ='''WIN'''= Satisfaction. Freedom. Peace. Safety. Everything you have ever wished was about to reach the palm of your hands. There was darkness. And then there was light. Darkness. Light. Darkness Light. The cycle repeated endlessly. Even fate was trying to stop you from reaching the end. You continuously fought and fought, until you physically and mentally couldn't. Soon everything morphed and changed in front of your eyes. The truth was slipping away from your grasp. You were being defeated. A portal appeared behind you, you desperately tried to escape, but you were being sucked in. Inside the portal, you saw everything. You saw your [[Level 0|beginning]]. You saw [[Level 1000|denial]]. You saw [[Level 398|a twisted version of your reality]]. You saw [[Phenomenon 25|another ending you could have chosen]]. You saw [[The Worst Fate|the worst possible choice]]. The [[Backrooms Wiki|entire universe]] was rooting against you. And so, within the depths of time and space, you found a way out. {{Fullscreen|show=Or did you find something else..?|hide=No way out.|padding=2rem 15%|number=2|content= {{Background|num=11111|file=Coolimage.png}} THE GREAT BEYOND. ==Description== '''The Great Beyond''' is one of the most unknown areas within the Backrooms, treated as a rumor. '''The Great Beyond''' is only accessible through [[Level 1000|the end of the prison]], and is an inescapable area, acting as the final ending for those who have managed to survive up to this point. The level acts as a generator/stabilizer; it transports life into the Backrooms, keeping it stable. People believe that if the level were to disappear, the Backrooms would completely collapse, annihilating everything within it. The Great Beyond exists outside the realm of the Backrooms, however, it is still considered an area within it as theoretically, you can still access it through the Backrooms. '''The Great Beyond's''' appearance is a mix of distortion and disorientation. Resembling as though you are trapped in time itself, trapped between the line that separates life and death, trapped in pure nothingness. There are constant flashes and buzzing noises, which can easily lead to insanity. You cannot move or do anything within '''The Great Beyond''' as you are stuck in limbo. You are forced to face eternal torture and are unable to die or exit the level. '''This will be your ending. Your home, forever.''' '''There may be a way to beat fate. A way out of suffering. A way to start the cycle once more. But for now, nobody knows what lies beyond the fabric of reality.''' ==Entities== It is just you. There are no other entities or creatures. '''You are alone, forever.''' ==Colonies and Outposts== Do you regret seeking an ending. Do you regret leaving your friends behind, shunting them aside, just for your own self-gain? ==Entrances and Exits== ===Entrances=== Break through the prison and time itself. ===Exits== You thought you had finally achieved freedom. You thought you finally escaped. You thought you could finally flee from your past without any consequences. We are here to tell you that you have been horribly mistaken. We are here to tell you that you will be stuck here for eternity. There might have been an exit, or maybe not. It might not be here, or it might. But instead of manipulating your trust, how about I give you an opportunity? An opportunity to start over. An opportunity to repeat your journey. You will no longer know anything about the Backrooms, but maybe this time, you will finally break through without succumbing to fate or destiny. But you will return to your humble beginnings. Accept the offer, and you get another chance. Reject the offer, and you will be stuck here for thousands and thousands of centuries. [[Level 0|You decide]]. [[File:Thebackrooms.jpg|center|thumb|564x564px]] }} WHAT LIES BEYOND THE SURFACE CAN CHANGE THE WORLD. {{Audio|file=Heavenly.mp3|=yes|loop=yes|volume=0.5}} {{Collapse|initial='''> Open Author & Licensing Information'''|final='''> Close Author & Licensing Information'''|body= '''Author:''' [[User:NormalDudeWithaNormalLife|Normal]]
